## Changelog

## Version impact (SemVer)

<!-- Delete the lines that don't apply. -->

- MAJOR — breaking change to role variables, depended-on task names, or required Ansible/OS versions
- MINOR — new role, new variable, or new optional behaviour
- PATCH — bug fix, lint fix, or dependency bump with no role behaviour change
